name: KATANAKA SNIPER

abilities.name: Advanced Sights
abilities.text: This model receives a (+) when targeting models at a lower elevation.

abilities.name: From Shadow
abilities.text: This model is deployed during the start phase of turn 1 anywhere on the table, not within 2" of a Strategy marker or enemy deployment zone.

actions.name: Ansatsu Rifle
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action receives a raise, it may ignore one (fortitude) or (warding) ability on the target.

triggers.name: Maneuver
triggers.text: Another ally within LoS may move up to 3".

triggers.name: Assassinate
triggers.text: After killing, gain a Fast token.

triggers.name: Daze
triggers.text: Target gains a Stunned token and this model may move it up to 3".

actions.name: Concealing Shadow
actions.effects: Make a Shadow marker within range. One ally within 2" of the marker gains an Adaptable token.

extraction_notes: Health bar shows numbered pips from 1-7
